description_long: This is a wooden fence section featuring three robust vertical posts, each topped with a dark red pyramid-shaped cap. The fence is constructed from thick, brown wooden beams arranged in a geometric pattern, with diagonal cross-bracing between the posts for added strength and visual interest. The horizontal rails are solid and connect the posts, while the lower section of the fence is open, allowing visibility through the structure. The wood grain texture is visible, giving the fence a rustic and natural appearance suitable for parks, gardens, or residential boundaries. The overall design is sturdy and decorative, with the pyramid caps providing a finished look. There are no gates or movable parts visible in this section.
description: A sturdy wooden fence section with three posts, dark red pyramid caps, and diagonal cross-bracing for strength and decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the fence, three posts with pyramid caps, and the diagonal cross-bracing pattern.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the fence and the alignment of the three capped posts.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the same post and cross-bracing arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the three capped posts in a line.
